description: Floor plan advisor model trained on ResPlan dataset

response_templates.solo: A compact 1-bedroom home for yourself — got it.
response_templates.couple: A 2-bedroom home for a couple sounds great.
response_templates.family3: A 2-bedroom layout for a small family of 3.
response_templates.family4: 3 bedrooms for a family of 4 with kids — perfect.
response_templates.bigfamily: 5+ bedrooms for your big family — I'll find spacious plans.
response_templates.wfh: Storage/study room for your home office noted ✓
response_templates.garden: Garden area added to your requirements ✓
response_templates.vastu: Plans will be ranked by Vastu Shastra compliance ✓
response_templates.budget_low: Filtering for compact, budget-friendly area ranges.
response_templates.greeting: Hello! Tell me about your family and what features you need.
response_templates.help: Just describe your household naturally — I'll set the filters. Say 'find plans' when ready.

follow_up_questions.family: How many people will live in the home? (e.g. couple, family of 4, joint family)
follow_up_questions.features: Any specific needs — parking, balcony, garden, home office, or a duplex layout?
follow_up_questions.vastu: Would you like plans ranked by Vastu Shastra principles? (yes / no)
follow_up_questions.confirm: Say "find plans" and I'll apply all your preferences to the search!
